title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Michael J M Reid December 2024
body: "Summary of complaint: In terms of Regulation 5.33 of the ICAS Insolvency Regulations, notice is hereby given that the ICAS Authorisation Committee has applied a regulatory penalty of £11,500 to the Insolvency Practitioner Michael Reid in respect of the following three issues:   A failure to maintain adequate and compliant time records as required by Statement of Insolvency Practice 9; A failure to review or verify employee claims against payroll or other appropriate documentation, and to notify the Redundancy Payments Service that claims were not verified; and A failure to document investigation work to support conclusions reached, including investigations into the validity and potential misuse of a Bounce Bank Loan.  "
